freedom.title: FreeDOM Software
freedom.subtitle: The absolute intelligence behind your building. A comprehensive, beautifully designed software suite for programming, supervising, and managing your entire automation infrastructure.
freedom.whatTitle: Built for the People Who Install It
freedom.whatBody: FreeDOM is the configuration software our installers use to bring every module to life. It's an interactive, multilingual tool built around simple pop-up menus: scan your building's floor plans, name every zone, then connect any input — switches, detectors, sensors — to any output, from lights to blinds to radiator valves. Part of the logic is then uploaded directly into the microprocessor-based modules, so your building keeps running exactly as programmed, even with the PC switched off.
freedom.supervisionBody: Nestor's live device tree keeps every meter, sensor and system in view — the same real-time engine behind FreeDOM's supervision and financial monitoring.
freedom.featuresSubtitle: FreeDOM provides an unparalleled suite of tools designed specifically for facility managers and system integrators.
freedom.feat1Desc: Scan your building's plans, name every zone, and connect any input to any output — lights, blinds, radiator valves — through simple pop-up menus.
freedom.feat2Desc: Monitor the exact state of your building's systems in real-time with zero latency.
freedom.feat3Desc: Track costs, catch anomalies, and split expenses fairly across tenants — down to prepaid billing.
freedom.feat4Desc: Fine-tune dimming and setpoints, or let FreeDOM learn your building's 10-day temperature history to time every heating and cooling cycle automatically.
freedom.feat5Desc: Seamless integration with fire, intrusion and panic-button systems — including automatic calls to emergency services.
freedom.feat6Desc: Control and monitor your entire building from anywhere, or let FreeDOM simulate occupancy — lights, doors, even the TV — while you're away.
freedom.desktopSubtitle: A drag-and-drop SCADA view of your building, compatible with Nestor, Hikvision, Raspberry Pi, SVTech and Fireclass devices out of the box.
freedom.desktopFeature1: 8 categories, one panel — scenes, lighting, blinds, sensors, access, climate, sockets and cameras
freedom.desktopFeature2: Drag-and-drop plan view — every device placed exactly where it sits in your building
freedom.desktopFeature3: Full history and graphs for temperature, consumption and every other tracked value
freedom.desktopFeature4: Real-time control via our NESTOR protocol — lights, dimmers, thermostats, doors and sockets respond instantly
freedom.wiringSubtitle: Real panel wiring from BAT installations — see exactly how our modules connect together.
freedom.munnBody: Munn is the companion app developed in-house by our R&D team — it brings together a wide range of IoT devices and smart technologies found in modern residential and office buildings. With Munn, you'll never worry about a door left open — the app manages every smart system in your home, from one place.
freedom.uncompromisedDesc: Achieve the perfect environment effortlessly. Our systems continuously monitor and adjust temperature, lighting, and ventilation tailored perfectly to your daily operational needs.
about.title: Pioneering Building Automation
about.subtitle: The intelligence behind smarter, safer buildings.
about.storyBody: BAT — Building Automation Transmission (Btg SA) specialises in intelligent building automation. We design and manufacture a complete range of modules that obtain data and control any type of device, uniting all the technologies of a building into one coherent system.
about.missionBody: Our mission is to bring all the isolated technologies of a building together into a single, highly cohesive ecosystem. We don't just automate; we intelligently orchestrate.
about.missionDetails: By developing our own proprietary hardware modules paired with the robust FreeDOM software suite, we offer an unprecedented level of integration, reliability, and flexibility tailored to the exacting demands of modern architecture.
about.adv1Body: A highly robust proprietary communication protocol ensuring flawless, zero-latency data transmission across hundreds of modules.
about.adv2Body: The ultimate supervisor tool. Monitor, configure, and override the entire ecosystem from any device, anywhere in the world.
about.industriesBody: Our highly adaptable systems scale effortlessly, providing tailored automation solutions across a diverse range of critical sectors.
about.busBody: Every module communicates over the robust BAT BUS — a single, scalable wiring backbone that links power, acquisition, control and communication modules. Add or repeat the bus to extend supervision across an entire site.
